description_long: This shotgun features a compact design with a short, vented barrel and a robust wooden full stock. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a prominent cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath the action. The fore-end is minimal, and the barrel has a series of vent holes along the top, likely for heat dissipation. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall appearance suggests a tactical, urban-oriented firearm with a blend of wood and metal materials.
description: A compact shotgun with a vented metal barrel, wooden full stock, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, vented barrel, and drum magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the alignment of the barrel, the width of the stock, and the circular drum magazine protruding below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the drum magazine and vented barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, vent holes along the barrel, and the round profile of the drum magazine.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top; short barrel length.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
